# Introduction

This is a sample document for testing TablaCognita.

## Getting Started

To begin, open the editor and start writing.

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- A modern browser

## Features

TablaCognita supports **real-time** collaboration between humans and AI agents.

The editor provides:
- Section-based addressing
- Fuzzy text replacement
- Lock-based collision avoidance

## Conclusion

This document demonstrates the section structure used by TablaCognita.
